description: Generic indoor campus graph for prototype navigation without QR.

edges.say: From CCIS, go straight to Commons C.
From Commons C, go back toward CCIS.
From Chemistry, go to Commons C.
From Commons C, go toward Chemistry.
From BioSci, go to Commons C.
From Commons C, go toward BioSci.
From Commons C, go straight toward CAB.
From CAB, go back toward Commons C.
From CAB, go straight to HUB Mall.
From HUB, go back toward CAB.
From CAB, go to Alumni Walk Commons.
From Alumni Walk Commons, go back toward CAB.
From CAB, go to SAB.
From SAB, go back toward CAB.
From CAB, go straight toward Cameron Library.
From Cameron Library, go back toward CAB.
From Cameron Library, go to Convocation Commons.
At Convocation Commons, turn toward Cameron Library.
At Convocation Commons, go toward Rutherford Library.
From Rutherford South, go to Convocation Commons.
At Convocation Commons, go toward Arts Building.
From Arts Building, go to Convocation Commons.
At Convocation Commons, go toward Humanities.
From Humanities, go to Convocation Commons.
From Humanities, go to HUB Mall.
From HUB, go toward Humanities.
From Humanities, go toward Tory Building.
From Tory, go toward Humanities.
From HUB, go to SUB.
From SUB, go back toward HUB.
From SUB, go to GSB.
From GSB, go back toward SUB.
From GSB, go to NREF.
From NREF, go back toward GSB.
From NREF, go to Discovery Commons.
From Discovery Commons, go toward NREF.
From Discovery Commons, go to ETLC.
From ETLC, go to Discovery Commons.
From Discovery Commons, go toward NINT.
From NINT, go to Discovery Commons.
From Discovery Commons, go toward Computing Science Centre.
From Computing Science Centre, go to Discovery Commons.
From ETLC, go to NINT.
From NINT, go back toward ETLC.
From ETLC, go to University Transit Centre bus stop.
From University Transit Centre, go back toward ETLC.
From NINT, go to University Transit Centre.
From University Transit Centre, go toward NINT.
